features: Old Spice Original scent of Cinnamon, Vanilla & Citrus Notes makes you unforgettable, you'll basically be the center of the universe
Say goodbye to odours for 48 hours
Acts like a protective shield against white marks and yellow stains
description: Product Description Old Spice Original, if your grandfather hadn't worn it you wouldn't exist. Old Spice Original has been the unmistakable fragrance of the experienced man for decades. How to smell good? We should trust our Grandfathers' Instincts. Use the Old Spice deodorant body spray. The scent of masculinity. Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Citral, Alcohol Denat., Eugenol Directions Shake before use. Keep at a distance of 15 cm and apply a short burst to each armpit. Reapply as needed during the day or after physical activity. Safety Warning Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C/122°F. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Use in a well ventilated area. Avoid deliberate inhalation. Use only as directed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. If rash develops discontinue use. Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets into eyes, rinse with plenty of water. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
